redaction_requirements: replace permit numbers, application numbers, IVR numbers, addresses, names, emails, phone numbers, account identifiers, invoice numbers, and private document labels with typed placeholders
record only UI structure, visible label categories, and synthetic status categories
do not store screenshots, traces, HAR files, browser storage, cookies, auth state, raw authenticated HTML, or private field values
manual_attendance_checkpoints: user opens DevHub in a visible browser and completes login, MFA, CAPTCHA, or security prompts manually
observer pauses before any button or link that could submit, certify, upload, pay, schedule, cancel, withdraw, extend, reactivate, or change account settings
observer confirms the next step remains read-only before recording any redacted surface structure

synthetic_surfaces.objective: Observe the authenticated home surface navigation and read-only account-scoped entry points using synthetic labels only.
safe_read_only_evidence_needs: presence of page heading or equivalent home landmark
presence of navigation categories for permits, requests, payments, inspections, or messages without opening consequential workflows

synthetic_surfaces.objective: Observe the list structure for permits and requests without storing private identifiers or opening official action controls.
safe_read_only_evidence_needs: redacted table or list column labels
synthetic status category vocabulary such as draft, under review, corrections, issued, or closed

synthetic_surfaces.objective: Observe permit detail status regions and messages in a redacted read-only manner.
safe_read_only_evidence_needs: presence or absence of correction request sections without correction text
review group status categories without private reviewer notes

synthetic_surfaces.objective: Observe whether fee notice review surfaces expose read-only fee status cues while blocking financial actions.
safe_read_only_evidence_needs: presence of fee notice or balance due category without amount capture
labels for payment information sections without opening payment entry

synthetic_surfaces.objective: Observe attachment list and inspection result structures without downloads, uploads, scheduling, or private document capture.
safe_read_only_evidence_needs: attachment category labels without filenames or downloads
inspection result category labels without private notes
presence of upload or schedule controls only as blocked-action evidence
